The '''MC80 evacuation cruiser''', or '''MC80 evacuation carrier''', was a modified version of the [[MC80 Star Cruiser/Legends|MC80 Star Cruiser]] that was designed for carrying civilians during a mass evacuation.

==Characteristics==
Modified from civilian and military [[MC80 Star Cruiser/Legends|MC80 Star Cruisers]], each evacuation [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] was capable of safely carrying 75,000 people, though its capacity could be doubled at great risk, in addition to 16,000 [[Metric ton/Legends|tons]] of cargo. All the weapons systems and [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|shield generators]] were removed, making room for added [[Life support/Legends|life-support systems]]. The [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrives]] on these vessels were also reduced to Class 4 with a Class 14 backup, and allowed the cruisers to make only a few short jumps.<ref name="DESB" />

==History==
In [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]],<ref name="NEC" /> [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[Technician/Legends|technicians]] converted MC80 [[Star Cruiser/Legends|Star Cruisers]] into evacuation [[Transport/Legends|transports]] at a rate exceeding one-per-[[Standard day/Legends|day]] to escape the [[Dark Empire|Imperial]] [[Battle of Calamari|attack]] on their [[Dac/Legends|planet]] spearheaded by the destructive [[World Devastator]]s. Though the evacuation was ultimately unnecessary,<ref name="DESB" /> many of the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] inhabitants boarded the cruisers and fled from the battle.<ref name="DE2">[[Dark Empire 2|''Dark Empire'' 2]]</ref>

==Appearances==
*[[Dark Empire 2|''Dark Empire'' 2]] {{1st}}
